playbook.intent: Senior + junior pair on a single PR review session. Senior narrates the why behind each comment; AI bot pre-runs the diff to surface obvious lint/security/test-coverage issues so the human time goes to design + judgment. Junior leaves with a concrete next-PR checklist.
playbook.scope: Senior + junior pair on a single PR review session. Senior narrates the why behind each comment; AI bot pre-runs the diff to surface obvious lint/security/test-coverage issues so the human time goes to design + judgment. Junior leaves with a concrete next-PR checklist.

success-criteria.criterion: All 4 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Set Mentoring Intent
stage.intent: Review and teach at the same time.

tasks.task: Pair the junior with a senior reviewer for the cycle
Define the teach-list: 2-3 patterns to coach per PR
Agree the review tone: rigor without bruising

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when both reviewer and junior have signed on to the loop.

stage.name: Review Together

tasks.task: Junior presents the PR: intent, design, tradeoffs
Senior asks questions before suggesting fixes
Capture coaching notes inline in the PR thread

stage.decision-gate: Advance when junior can articulate the design decisions unaided.

stage.name: Iterate & Merge
stage.intent: Junior owns the fixes; senior verifies.

tasks.task: Junior addresses every comment with code + reasoning
Senior verifies fix quality, not just code change

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when merge bar is met.

stage.name: Retro & Track

tasks.task: Capture lessons in the junior's growth doc
Tag patterns that need re-coaching in future PRs

stage.decision-gate: Required output: an updated junior growth doc per PR.
